summary: Run a Quick Start scan against a local test app and triage the results.
starter:
# Start OWASP Juice Shop (local test app)
docker run -d -p 3000:3000 bkimminich/juice-shop

# Optional: start ZAP Webswing
docker run -u zap -p 8080:8080 -p 8090:8090 -i ghcr.io/zaproxy/zaproxy:stable zap-webswing.sh
objectives: Launch a local test target and confirm it is reachable.
Run a Quick Start automated scan in ZAP.
Review and triage the resulting alerts.
solutionOutline: Verify Juice Shop is running at http://localhost:3000.
Open ZAP Quick Start and run an automated scan on the target URL.
Review alerts by risk and confidence; note at least three findings.
Export a report or capture screenshots for documentation.
title: Lab 1: Quick Start Scan
steps: Start the local test app and confirm it loads in your browser.
In Quick Start, choose Automated Scan and enter the target URL.
Run the scan and monitor progress.
Review alerts, classify severity, and record findings.
overview:
## Goal
Use ZAP Quick Start to scan a local test application and practice triage.

### Requirements
- You must own or have permission to test the target
- Use a local test app (like OWASP Juice Shop)

### Deliverables
- A short list of prioritized alerts
- A brief summary of what you observed
